initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN frpm.District Type = 'Unified' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN frpm.District Type = 'Elementary' THEN 1 END) AS ratio
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE schools.County = 'Orange';

aggregation.selected_sql:
